mapper.update: update employee set name = #{name},phone = #{phone},position = #{position},remark = #{remark},update_time = #{updateTime},gender = #{gender},status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select * from employee
and name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
and phone like concat('%',#{phone},'%')
and status = #{status}
order by create_time desc
